scripts.postinstall: npm run install:all && npm run build && cd build/server && npm install --omit=dev && npx prisma generate
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && node scripts/consolidate-build.js
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
